use_cases: Animated tab navigation with smooth motion transitions between tab states
Content switching with visual feedback on tab selection
Hover-activated tab highlighting with animated highlight indicators
Controlled or uncontrolled tab selection patterns for flexible implementation
ai_summary: A motion-enhanced tab navigation component that provides smooth animated transitions and hover effects for tab selection. Supports both controlled and uncontrolled modes with customizable motion effects, featuring a morphing highlight that follows the active tab.
